hero.title: Uphuhliso lwee-software zoshishino
hero.description: Ukuphela kokuphela kwezicelo zeshishini kunye nezikhokelo zale mihla, ulwakhiwo lwe-API-first, kunye ne-scalability yelifu.

problem.title: Ukuqulunqwa kweNgxaki yeShishini
problem.subtitle: Apho iinkqubo zeshishini ziphulukana nesantya, uhlahlo-lwabiwo mali kunye nolungelelwaniso olucwangcisiweyo

approach.title: Indlela yobunjineli
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiguqula ngayo iimfuno ezingaqondakaliyo zibe ngamaqonga alungele imveliso

principles.title: Imigaqo yoyilo
principles.subtitle: Izigqibo zoyilo ezigcina iinkqubo zeshishini zigcinwa kwinqanaba

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwenkonzo
breakdown.subtitle: Indlela ehleliweyo ukusuka ekufumaneni ukuya ekunikezelweni kwemveliso ezinzileyo

problem.overview: Amaqela eshishini ahlala ethwala ukuhamba komsebenzi okubalulekileyo kwiinkqubo eziqhekezayo, ukudala ixesha elide lokukhokela, idatha engahambelaniyo, kunye nolungelelwaniso lwezandla ezibizayo phakathi kwamasebe.
painPoints: Izibophelelo zokuhanjiswa ziyatyibilika ngenxa yokuba ukuxhomekeka kuwo onke amaqela akulawulwa
I-logic yeshishini eliphambili iphindwe kabini kuwo onke amajelo kunye neemveliso
Ukudityaniswa kwelifa kwenza ukumiliselwa kweempawu ezintsha kube nomngcipheko omkhulu kwaye kucotha
impactSignals: Imephu yendlela yehla ngelixa inkcitho yobunjineli inyuka
Iziphene ezijongene nabathengi zinyuka ngexesha lokukhululwa
Ukwenza izigqibo kuyacotha ngenxa yeengxelo zokusebenza ezingahambelaniyo

approach.overview: Senza ngolwakhiwo lokuqala, ukuhanjiswa okuqhutywa sisivumelwano, kunye nobunjineli bokukhutshwa okulawulwayo ukuze ixabiso leshishini lihanjiswe ngokunyuka okuqikelelweyo.

pillars.title: Imodeli yeDomain kunye neemeko ezibotshelelwe
pillars.detail: Sibeka imephu yemimandla ukucacisa imida yenkonzo ukunciphisa ukudityaniswa kweqela elinqamlezileyo kunye nokucacisa ubunini.

pillars.title: Isicwangciso-qhinga sokudityaniswa kwe-API
pillars.detail: Sichaza izivumelwano ezizinzileyo kwangoko, okwenza uphuhliso oluhambelanayo kunye nokudityaniswa okukhuselekileyo kunye neenkqubo zeshishini.

pillars.title: Ukuhanjiswa komsebenzi oqhubekayo
pillars.detail: Sisebenzisa iiflegi zeempawu, ukukhutshwa kwenqanaba, kunye namasango asemgangathweni ukukhupha ngokukhawuleza ngaphandle kokuphazamisa imveliso.

principles.overview: Izigqibo zethu zokwakha zibeka phambili ixesha elide, ukusebenza, kunye nobunini obucacileyo ukuze amaqonga ahlale eguquguqukayo njengoko ububanzi beshishini bukhula.

items.title: Imida yenkonzo yemodyuli
items.detail: Ubuchule bupakishwe kwimimandla yeshishini ukugcina impembelelo yotshintsho indawo.

items.title: Ukudityaniswa okuqhutywa ngumnyhadala
items.detail: Ukuhamba komsebenzi kwe-Asynchronous kusetyenziswa apho ukunyamezelana kwe-latency kukhoyo ukuphucula ukomelela kunye nokuhlukanisa iinkqubo.

items.title: Ukuqwalaselwa ngoyilo
items.detail: Ukulandelela, iimetrikhi, kunye neelogs ezicwangcisiweyo zichazwe kwangaphambili ukuxhasa imisebenzi ethembekileyo kunye nolawulo lwe-SLA.

breakdown.title: Ukufunyanwa kunye noLwakhiwo
breakdown.summary: Sibeka imephu yezinto eziphambili zeshishini, izithintelo zobuchwephesha, kunye nolwakhiwo ekujoliswe kulo ngaphambi kokuba kuqaliswe ukuphunyezwa.

breakdown.title: Ukwakha kunye nokudityaniswa
breakdown.summary: Amaqela ethu aphumeza iimpawu eziphambili, umaleko wokudityaniswa, kunye nokhuseleko lomgangatho ngaxeshanye.
deliverables: Ukudityaniswa kwe-API kunye nokudityaniswa komntu wesithathu
Uvavanyo oluzenzekelayo kunye nokuhlolwa kokulungela ukukhutshwa

breakdown.title: Qalisa inkqubo ye-Evolution
breakdown.summary: Emva kokuhamba-bukhoma, sizinzisa imisebenzi kwaye sichaze umjikelo olandelayo wokuphucula ngokusekwe ekusetyenzisweni kwangempela.
deliverables: Imephu yemephu yasemva kokumiliselwa kunye nokuphuculwa kwe-backlog

cta.title: Ukulungele ukwakha isicelo sakho esilandelayo?
cta.description: Masiqulunqe kwaye sithumele isisombululo esiqhuba iziphumo zeshishini ezinokulinganiswa.

hero.title: I-AI, i-ML kunye ne-Business Intelligence
hero.description: Ukusuka kwiimodeli zokuqikelela ukuya kwiideshibhodi ezilawulayo, sakha iinkqubo ezipheleleyo ze-AI / BI ezixhasa izigqibo kwisikali.

problem.title: Ukuqulunqwa kweNgxaki yeShishini
problem.subtitle: Kutheni iinkampani ezityebileyo zedatha zisasokola ukwenza izigqibo ezithembekileyo

approach.title: Indlela yobunjineli
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiyisebenzisa ngayo iimveliso zedatha, iimodeli ze-ML, kunye nokuhamba komsebenzi we-BI

principles.title: Imigaqo yoyilo
principles.subtitle: Ugcino-lwazi kunye neepateni zoyilo lwemodeli zobukrelekrele bezigqibo ezithembekileyo

capabilities.title: Ubuchule bethu
capabilities.subtitle: Izisombululo ezibanzi ze-AI, ML, kunye ne-BI

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwenkonzo
breakdown.subtitle: Indlela Esihamba Ngayo Ukusuka Kwidatha eQhekekileyo ukuya kwiMveliso yeNqanaba leMveliso

problem.overview: Imibutho ihlala iqokelela imithamo emikhulu yedatha kodwa iyasilela ukuyiguqulela kuqikelelo oluthembekileyo, izigqibo zokusebenza, okanye isenzo seshishini esinokulinganiswa.
painPoints: Ingqiqo yokunika ingxelo iyahluka kumaqela, ekhokelela kumabali e-KPI aphikisanayo
Iimodeli zihlala zivavanya kwaye azize zifikelele kwimisebenzi yemveliso
Imiba yomgangatho wedatha ijongela phantsi ukuthembela kuhlalutyo kunye needashboard ezilawulayo
impactSignals: Imijikelezo yezigqibo iyacotha kuba amaqela axoxe ngokunyaniseka kwedatha endaweni yesenzo
Ukuchaneka kokuqikelela kunye nokucwangcisa kuhlala kungahambelani nekota ngaphezulu kwekota
Utyalo-mali lwe-Analytics lubonisa ukwamkelwa okuphantsi ngaphandle kwamaqela ahlalutyi abakhethekileyo

approach.overview: Sihambisa amaqonga e-AI kunye ne-BI njengeenkqubo zemveliso, ukudibanisa ubunjineli bedatha, ukusebenza komjikelo wobomi bemodeli, kunye nokudityaniswa kokuhamba komsebenzi kwesigqibo.

pillars.title: Isiseko seMveliso yoLwazi
pillars.detail: Iimveliso zedatha ezilungelelanisiweyo ze-domain zimisela igalelo elinokuphinda lisetyenziswe, elilawulwayo, kunye nomgangatho ophezulu wohlalutyo kunye ne-ML.

pillars.title: I-MLOps Lifecycle Automation
pillars.detail: Uqeqesho, ukuhanjiswa, ukubeka iliso, kunye nolawulo lwe-drift kuzenzekelayo ukugcina iimodeli zithembekile kwimveliso.

pillars.title: Ukudityaniswa komsebenzi wesigqibo
pillars.detail: Ulwazi lufakwe kwizixhobo zokusebenza kunye needashboard ukuze amaqela asebenze ngobukrelekrele kwiinkqubo zemihla ngemihla.

principles.overview: Uyilo lwethu lwe-AI / BI lubeka phambili idatha ethembekileyo, iimodeli ezichazayo, kunye neepateni zokufikelela ezilawulwayo kwishishini.

items.title: Inkcazo ye-metric enye
items.detail: Ii-KPIs ezibalulekileyo zichazwa kube kanye ngeemodeli ze-semantic ekwabelwana ngazo ukuphelisa ingqiqo yokunika ingxelo ephikisanayo.

items.title: Ulawulo lokuthembeka kwemodeli
items.detail: Imida yokusebenza, ukufunyanwa kwe-drift, kunye neendlela zokubuyisela umva zikhusela umgangatho wezigqibo kwimveliso.

items.title: Ukhuseleko kunye nolawulo ngoyilo
items.detail: Umgca wedatha, ukufikelela kwindima, kunye nolawulo olulungele uphicotho-zincwadi lufakwe kumbhobho ngamnye.

breakdown.title: Isiseko seDatha
breakdown.summary: Siphicotha imithombo, sichaza izivumelwano zedatha, kwaye simisela ulawulo ukuze yonke imodeli iqale ngegalelo elithembekileyo.

breakdown.title: Imodeli kunye nokuhanjiswa kwe-Insight
breakdown.summary: Sakha iimodeli kunye needeshibhodi zezigqibo ezibotshelelwe kwimibuzo yeshishini enokulinganiswa kunye nee-KPIs.

breakdown.title: I-MLOps kunye nokwamkelwa
breakdown.summary: Senza ukuhanjiswa, ukubeka iliso, kunye nokunika amandla iqela ukugcina iziphumo zithembekile ekuhambeni kwexesha.
deliverables: Ukuphambuka, ukuchaneka kunye nokubeka esweni ukusetyenziswa
Ukunikezelwa kweqela kunye nencwadi yokudlala yokusebenza

cta.title: Guqula idatha yakho ibe yi-Insight
cta.description: Guqula idatha eqhekekileyo ibe bukrelekrele obucacileyo, obusebenzayo.

hero.title: Uyilo lwelifu kunye neziseko zophuhliso
hero.description: Amaqonga amafu amaninzi, ulwakhiwo olomeleleyo, kunye neziseko zophuhliso ezenzelwe ukukhula kwexesha elide.

problem.title: Ukuqulunqwa kweNgxaki yeShishini
problem.subtitle: Kutheni amaphulo elifu emile emva kokufuduka kokuqala

approach.title: Indlela yobunjineli
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiyakha ngayo amaqonga elifu akhuselekileyo, anokulinganiswa kunye nomngcipheko wokufuduka olawulwayo

principles.title: Imigaqo yoyilo
principles.subtitle: Izigqibo zeqonga ezilungelelanisa ubuchule, ukomelela kunye nolawulo

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwenkonzo
breakdown.subtitle: Ulandelelwano olucacileyo loyilo, ukufuduka, kunye nokusebenza kwamaqonga effu

problem.overview: Imibutho emininzi igqibezela ukufuduka kwelifu kokuqala kodwa isasebenza njengamaqela e-on-prem, ngokubonakala okungalunganga, ulawulo olungahambelaniyo, kunye nokunyuka kwenkcitho.
painPoints: Imithwalo yomsebenzi ifuduswa ngaphandle kokhuseleko olusemgangathweni kunye nolawulo lwenethiwekhi
Iindleko zelifu zikhula ngokukhawuleza kunexabiso leshishini elihanjiswayo
Ukubonelelwa kokusingqongileyo kuhlala kuyandleni kwaye kungangqinelani kuwo onke amaqela
impactSignals: Iziganeko eziqhelekileyo ezibangelwa kukuphambuka kokuqwalaselwa phakathi kokusingqongileyo
Ukulungela uphicotho-zincwadi kuyancipha ngenxa yeendlela zolawulo eziqhekekileyo
Amaxesha okukhokela iziseko zophuhliso alibazisa imveliso kunye nedatha

approach.overview: Siyila amaqonga effu njengeemveliso, sisebenzisa iziseko zophuhliso ezizenzekelayo, umgaqo-nkqubo wokukhusela, kunye namaza okufuduka ahambelana nokubaluleka kweshishini.

pillars.title: Indawo yokumisa njengekhowudi
pillars.detail: Isazisi, uthungelwano, ukhuseleko, kunye neziseko zomgaqo-nkqubo ziqulunqwe ukuze ziphindaphindwe kwaye ziphicothiwe.

pillars.title: Isicwangciso-qhinga sokufuduka esisekwe kumaza
pillars.detail: Imithwalo yomsebenzi ihamba kwizigaba ezilawulwayo ngokulandelelana kokuxhomekeka kunye nokulungela ukubuyisela umva.

pillars.title: I-SRE + FinOps Operating Loop
pillars.detail: Izalathisi zokuthembeka kunye ne-unit-economics zihlaziywa kunye ukuphucula zombini ixesha lokuphumla kunye nokusebenza kakuhle.

principles.overview: Imodeli yethu yoyilo ithanda iziseko zophuhliso ezichazayo, ukufikelela okuncinci, kunye namaqonga anokudityaniswa axhasa ukuhanjiswa kwemveliso ngokukhawuleza.

items.title: Iipateni zeziseko ezingundoqo ezingaguqukiyo
items.detail: Iindawo zakhiwa ngokutsha ukusuka kwikhowudi eguqulweyo ukunciphisa ukuphambuka kunye nokwenza lula ukubuyiselwa kokusebenza.

items.title: Isiseko soKhuseleko ngokuMiselweyo
items.detail: Ulawulo lokufikelela kwi-zero-trust kunye nokunyanzeliswa komgaqo-nkqubo kufakwe kuyo yonke imijikelo yobomi bendalo esingqongileyo.

items.title: Ukomelela ngokusabalalisa
items.detail: Imithwalo yomsebenzi ebalulekileyo yenzelwe ukunyamezelana kwemimandla emininzi okanye imimandla emininzi apho ifuthe leshishini lifuna.

breakdown.title: Uyilo kunye nommandla wokufika
breakdown.summary: Sichaza imeko ekujoliswe kuyo, i-guardrails, kunye nemigangatho yeqonga elisisiseko ngaphambi kokuba imithwalo yemisebenzi ihambe.

breakdown.title: Ukufuduka kunye nolwakhiwo lweqonga
breakdown.summary: Senza amaza okufuduka kwaye siphakamise amacandelo eqonga lelifu ngokuzenzekelayo okuphindaphindiweyo.

breakdown.title: Ukuthembeka kunye neFinOps
breakdown.summary: Siphucula ukuthembeka kokusebenza kwaye siqhubeke nokwandisa inkcitho yelifu ngokusekwe kwi-telemetry ephilayo.
deliverables: Ii-SLOs, ukubeka iliso, kunye nokuhamba komsebenzi
Iindleko zokuphucula iindleko kunye ne-cadence yolawulo

cta.title: Linganisa iziseko zakho zophuhliso
cta.description: Yakha iziseko zelifu ezihlala ziqinile phantsi komthwalo wehlabathi lokwenyani.

hero.title: I-DevOps kunye nobunjineli beqonga
hero.description: Imibhobho yokuhambisa ngokuzenzekelayo, ukujongwa, kunye neendlela zeqonga eziphucula isantya ngaphandle kokuncama ukuthembeka.

problem.title: Ukuqulunqwa kweNgxaki yeShishini
problem.subtitle: Kutheni isantya sokuhambisa siyehla njengoko ubunzima beqonga bukhula

approach.title: Indlela yobunjineli
approach.subtitle: Indlela esilungelelanisa ngayo imibhobho yokuhambisa ngaphandle kokucothisa amaqela emveliso

principles.title: Imigaqo yoyilo
principles.subtitle: Iipateni zobunjineli beqonga ezilinganisa ukuthembeka kunye nokuzimela kweqela

capabilities.title: Iinkonzo ze-DevOps
capabilities.subtitle: Yenza ngokuzenzekelayo, beka iliso kwaye uphucule umjikelo wobomi bakho bokuhambisa

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwenkonzo
breakdown.subtitle: Imephu yendlela esebenzayo ukusuka kwiibhotile zokuhanjiswa ukuya ekukhutshweni okuphezulu

problem.overview: Imibutho ihlala ityale imali kwizixhobo ze-CI / CD kodwa isasokola ngokukhutshwa okungazinzanga, ukuvunywa okucothayo, kunye nobunini obuqhekekileyo kwiimeko-bume.
painPoints: Inkcazo yombhobho iyahluka ngeqela, idala amasango asemgangathweni angahambelaniyo
Ukuvunywa kokuthunyelwa ngesandla kulibazisa i-hotfix kunye nexesha lokukhutshwa kweempawu
Iziganeko ezisebenzayo ziyenzeka kwakhona kuba umnxeba womfanekiso awuphelelanga okanye uvaliwe
impactSignals: Ixesha elikhokelayo lotshintsho liyaqhubeka likhula nangona inkcitho yokuzenzekelayo
Tshintsha inqanaba lokungaphumeleli ngexesha lokuhambisa umthamo ophezulu
Imveliso yabaphuhlisi iyancipha ngenxa yokungqubana kwezixhobo kunye nokutshintsha komxholo

approach.overview: Siseka imodeli yeqonga labaphuhlisi bangaphakathi kunye neetemplate zombhobho ezinokuphinda zisebenze, ulawulo oluqhutywa ngumgaqo-nkqubo, kunye nokuqwalaselwa komjikelo wobomi.

pillars.title: Iitemplate zombhobho wendlela yegolide
pillars.detail: Iiplani ze-CI / CD ezinokuphinda zisebenze zilungelelanise ukwakha, uvavanyo, ukutshekishwa kwezokhuseleko, kunye nokuhambisa ukuhamba komsebenzi.

pillars.title: I-API yeqonga kunye ne-Self-Service
pillars.detail: Amaqela abonelela ngeemeko kunye nokukhupha iziseko zophuhliso ngokusebenzisa unxibelelwano olulawulwayo.

pillars.title: Ii-Loops zeMpendulo yokuThembeka
pillars.detail: Iindlela zeziganeko, impilo ye-SLO, kunye nokuthunyelwa kwe-telemetry kwazisa inkqubo eqhubekayo kunye nokuphuculwa kolwakhiwo.

principles.overview: Uyilo lwethu lwe-DevOps lulungelelanisa isantya sokuhambisa kunye nolawulo ngokuzenzekelayo ulawulo kunye nokunciphisa umsebenzi wokusebenza omnye.

items.title: Yonke into njengeKhowudi yeNguqulo
items.detail: Imibhobho, iziseko zophuhliso, kunye nemithetho yomgaqo-nkqubo ilawulwa kulawulo lomthombo wokuphicothwa kunye nokuphindaphinda.

items.title: Ukuqinisekiswa okuqhubekayo
items.detail: Umgangatho, ukhuseleko, kunye nokutshekishwa kokusebenza kulungelelaniswe kuwo onke amanqanaba ukufumanisa umngcipheko kwangaphambili.

items.title: Uxanduva lweqonga ekwabelwana ngalo
items.detail: Amaqela eqonga abonelela ngezakhono zendlela egangathiweyo ngelixa amaqela emveliso egcina ubunini bokuhambisa.

breakdown.title: Uvavanyo lweQonga
breakdown.summary: Sivavanya ikhonkco lakho lokuhambisa isoftware yangoku ukuchonga amanqaku omngcipheko kunye nezithintelo zesantya.

breakdown.title: Umbhobho kunye nolwakhiwo oluzenzekelayo
breakdown.summary: Siphumeza i-CI / CD ethembekileyo, amasango asemgangathweni, kunye neziseko ezizenzekelayo zokukhutshwa okungaguquguqukiyo.

breakdown.title: Sebenzisa kwaye uphucule
breakdown.summary: Simisela ukuqwalaselwa kunye nolawulo oluxhasa ukuphuculwa okuqhubekayo kokuhanjiswa.
deliverables: Ukubeka iliso kwiideshibhodi kunye nemigaqo-nkqubo yokulumkisa
Ukukhulula ulawulo kunye neencwadi zokudlala zeziganeko

cta.title: Ukukhawulezisa ukuhanjiswa kwakho
cta.description: Nciphisa ukungqubana kokukhululwa kunye nokuphucula ukuthembeka ngeendlela ezivuthiweyo ze-DevOps.

hero.title: Inguqu yedijithali kunye nesicwangciso
hero.description: Iingcebiso ezicwangcisiweyo kunye nenkxaso yokuphumeza ukuphucula amaqonga, amaqela kunye neemodeli zokusebenza.

problem.title: Ukuqulunqwa kweNgxaki yeShishini
problem.subtitle: Apho iinkqubo zenguqu zilahlekelwa ngamandla kunye nokuzithemba kwesigqeba

approach.title: Indlela yobunjineli
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiguqulela ngayo isicwangciso-qhinga kutshintsho oluphunyeziweyo, oluxhaswe yitekhnoloji

principles.title: Imigaqo yoyilo
principles.subtitle: Imodeli yokusebenza kunye nokukhethwa kweqonga elikhusela iziphumo zenguqu

technology.title: Isitaki seTekhnoloji
technology.subtitle: Amaqonga kunye nezikhokelo esizisebenzisayo ukwenza utshintsho

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwenkonzo
breakdown.subtitle: Utshintsho olucwangcisiweyo ukusuka kwinkcazo yesicwangciso-qhinga ukuya kwixabiso leshishini elinokulinganiswa

problem.overview: Amaphulo edijithali ahlala eqala ngenjongo eyomeleleyo kodwa asilele ukuguqula abe ziziphumo zokuhanjiswa ngenxa yobunini obungacacanga, izixhobo ezingaxhunyiwe, kunye nezinto eziphambili ezikhuphisanayo.
painPoints: Iimephu zendlela zenguqu zichaziwe kodwa aziguqulelwanga kulawulo lokuhambisa
Izinto eziphambili zoshishino kunye nobunjineli ziyahluka emva kwemijikelezo yokuqala yokucwangcisa
Iimodeli zokusebenza zelifa zithintela ukwamkelwa kweendlela zokuhambisa iimveliso zanamhlanje
impactSignals: Inkcitho yenkqubo inyuka ngelixa intshukumo ye-KPI ihlala ithe tyaba
Amaphulo aphoswa ngamanqaku e-handoff phakathi kweqhinga, ulwakhiwo, kunye nokuphunyezwa
Amaqela afumana ukudinwa kwenguqu kunye nexabiso elilinganiselweyo leshishini

approach.overview: Sidibanisa iingcebiso zobuchule kunye nolwakhiwo lokuhambisa, ukulungelelanisa uyilo lwemodeli yokusebenza, amandla eqonga, kunye ne-cadence yokuphumeza malunga neenjongo ezinokulinganiswa.

pillars.title: Ukubekwa phambili komsinga wexabiso
pillars.detail: Silandelelana amanyathelo ngokusekwe kwimpembelelo yeshishini elinokulinganiswa kunye nezithintelo zokuxhomekeka kwezobuchwephesha.

pillars.title: Uyilo lwemodeli yokusebenza ekujoliswe kuyo
pillars.detail: Iindima, ulawulo, kunye namalungelo ezigqibo zichazwe ukuxhasa ukuphunyezwa ngokukhawuleza kumaqela oshishino kunye netekhnoloji.

pillars.title: Ulawulo lokuHanjiswa kwePotifoliyo
pillars.detail: Inkqubela phambili yenguqu ilawulwa ngeendawo zokuhlola ezinxulumene ne-KPI kunye nolawulo lomngcipheko wepotifoliyo.

principles.overview: Uyilo lwethu lwenguqu lugxininisa ukuphuculwa okuqhubekayo kunye noxanduva olucacileyo, ukunqanda ukubhalwa kwakhona okuphazamisayo ngaphandle kwesizathu seshishini.

items.title: Ulungelelwaniso lwezakhono zoshishino
items.detail: Utshintsho lwetekhnoloji lucwangciswe ngokujikeleza ubuchule obubonisa ngokuthe ngqo ingeniso, umgangatho wenkonzo, okanye ukusebenza kweendleko.

items.title: Ubuchule beQonga eliHlanganisiweyo
items.detail: Izinto zeqonga zikhethwe ukusebenzisana ukuxhasa ukufuduka kwezigaba kunye nokulungelelaniswa ngokukhawuleza.

items.title: Ulawulo kunye ne-Delivery Cadence
items.detail: Iiforamu zezigqibo kunye neendawo zolawulo zifakwe kwimijikelezo ye-sprint kunye nekota, ayiphathwa njengeendlela ezahlukeneyo ze-bureaucratic.

breakdown.title: Ulungelelaniso lweQhinga
breakdown.summary: Silungelelanisa izinto eziphambili zobunkokeli kunye neenjongo zedijithali ukudala ulwalathiso lwenguqu ekwabelwana ngalo.

breakdown.title: Isicwangciso sokuphunyezwa
breakdown.summary: Sichaza imodeli yokusebenza ekujoliswe kuyo, imigangatho yoyilo, kunye nokulandelelana kokuphunyezwa kwamanqanaba.

breakdown.title: Utshintsho kunye nokuFezekiswa kweXabiso
breakdown.summary: Siqhuba ukwamkelwa, silandelela intshukumo ye-KPI, kwaye siphucula amanyathelo ngokusekwe kwiziphumo zokuhanjiswa.

cta.title: Qala uhambo lwakho lotshintsho
cta.description: Hamba ngotshintsho ngezinto eziphambili ezicacileyo kunye nezicwangciso ezisebenzayo zokuhambisa.

hero.title: I-IoT kunye ne-Edge Computing
hero.description: Iinkqubo ezixhunyiwe ukusuka kwisixhobo ukuya kwilifu, kunye nemibhobho ye-telemetry kunye nobukrelekrele bomda kwisikali semizi-mveliso.

problem.title: Ukuqulunqwa kweNgxaki yeShishini
problem.subtitle: Kutheni iinkqubo zezixhobo ezixhunyiwe zingaphumeleli ukunyuka ngaphaya kokuthunyelwa kweenqwelomoya

approach.title: Indlela yobunjineli
approach.subtitle: Indlela esiyila ngayo iinkqubo ze-IoT ezikhuselekileyo, ezisebenzayo ukusuka kwi-firmware yesixhobo ukuya kwii-API zelifu

principles.title: Imigaqo yoyilo
principles.subtitle: Imigaqo yoyilo lwe-Edge-to-Cloud yokuthembeka, i-latency, kunye nolawulo lweenqanawa

capabilities.title: Izisombululo ze-IoT
capabilities.subtitle: Qhagamshela, beka iliso kwaye uphucule izixhobo zakho

breakdown.title: Ukuqhekeka kwenkonzo
breakdown.subtitle: Indlela esihambisa ngayo iinkqubo ezixhunyiwe ukusuka kwizixhobo ze-edge ukuya kubukrelekrele belifu

problem.overview: Amaphulo e-IoT ahlala engqina ubuchule bobuchwephesha kubaqhubi beenqwelomoya kodwa asilela kwisikali ngenxa yonxibelelwano olungathembekanga, ulawulo lweenqwelo ezibuthathaka, kunye nokudityaniswa okungalunganga kunye nokuhamba komsebenzi kweshishini.
painPoints: Ukungena kwesixhobo kunye nolawulo lomjikelo wobomi kuhlala kuyandla kwaye kuphazamiseke
Imibhobho ye-Telemetry ivelisa ingxolo, engaphelelanga, okanye ukulibaziseka kolwazi lokusebenza
Umyalelo ode kunye nohlaziyo lwe-firmware luzisa umngcipheko wokhuseleko kunye nokhuseleko
impactSignals: Iimeko zokulinga ziyaphumelela, kodwa amaxesha okukhutshwa kwemveliso atyibilika ngokuphindaphindiweyo
Amaqela okusebenza kwentsimi asabela kwiziganeko ngaphandle kokubonakala kwangaphambili
Iinkqubo zeshishini azikwazi ukusebenzisa ubukrelekrele besixhobo ngexesha lokwenyani

approach.overview: Siyila amaqonga e-IoT njengeenkqubo ezisasaziweyo ezilawulwayo, sidibanisa imigangatho ekhuselekileyo yexesha lokubaleka, ukungena okuqhutywa ngumsitho, kunye nolawulo lokusebenza kwinqanaba leenqwelomoya.

pillars.title: Ulawulo olukhuselekileyo lomjikelo wobomi bezixhobo
pillars.detail: Ukubonelela, isazisi, ukujikeleza kwesitshixo, kunye nohlaziyo lwe-firmware luzenzekelayo ukunciphisa umngcipheko wokusebenza.

pillars.title: Uyilo lweTelemetry oluqhutywa yizenzo
pillars.detail: Imibhobho yokusasaza ilungelelanisa, iqinisekisa, kwaye ihambise iziganeko zesixhobo sohlalutyo kunye nolawulo kufutshane nexesha lokwenyani.

pillars.title: Inqwelo-moya yolawulo lwemisebenzi yomkhosi
pillars.detail: Ukubeka iliso, ukulumkisa, kunye nokuhamba komsebenzi komyalelo kude kubonelela ngolawulo oluthembekileyo kwiiasethi ezisasaziweyo.

principles.overview: Uyilo lwethu lwe-IoT lulinganisa izigqibo ezisezantsi kunye nolawulo oluphakathi, ukujongwa, kunye nokuthotyelwa kwezokhuseleko.

items.title: Ukuzimela komda ngokulungelelaniswa kwelifu
items.detail: Imisebenzi ebalulekileyo yendawo iyaqhubeka ngexesha lokutshatyalaliswa kwenethiwekhi ngelixa ivumelanisa imeko kwiinkqubo zelifu xa zikhona.

items.title: Izichwebo zeSiganeko seKhontrakthi
items.detail: Izixhobo kunye namaqela eqonga asebenzisa i-schemas ezilawulwayo ukugcina ukungaguquguquki kwe-telemetry kwiinguqulelo.

items.title: Ukhuseleko lwezixhobo ezingathembekanga
items.detail: Ukuqinisekiswa okudibeneyo, ilungelo elincinci, kunye nokuthuthwa okufihliweyo kunyanzeliswa kuyo yonke intsebenziswano yesixhobo.

breakdown.title: Isicwangciso sesixhobo kunye neqhinga lomphetho
breakdown.summary: Sichaza iipateni zonxibelelwano, imigangatho yexesha lokubaleka, kunye nokubonelelwa okukhuselekileyo kwezixhobo zentsimi.
deliverables: Ixesha lokubaleka kwe-Edge kunye nesicwangciso sokuhambisa

breakdown.title: I-Telemetry kunye ne-Plane yolawulo
breakdown.summary: Sakha imibhobho ebamba iminyhadala, imodeli yamawele edijithali, kwaye yenza ukuba ukuhamba komsebenzi kude.
deliverables: Uyilo lwexesha lokwenyani kunye noyilo lwe-schema yesiganeko
Amawele edijithali kunye nokuphunyezwa kwemodeli ye-asethi

breakdown.title: Imisebenzi kunye nesikali
breakdown.summary: Senza ulawulo lweenqwelo kunye nolawulo lokuthembeka lweendawo ze-IoT zemveliso.
deliverables: Ukubeka esweni umkhosi wezixhobo kunye nesilumkiso
Ukukhutshwa kunye nesicwangciso senkxaso yomjikelo wobomi

cta.title: Qhagamshela izixhobo zakho
cta.description: Yakha izisombululo ezithembekileyo ze-IoT ezilungele iimeko zokwenyani zemveliso.
